posts.text: Android启动流程123456789graph TDSTEP0[按下电源键]-->STEP1[BootLoader加载固化代码]-->STEP2[LinuxKernel]-->STEP3[启动init进程]-->STEP4[启动ServiceManager]-->STEP5[解析init.rc]-->STEP6[孵化zygote进程]-->STEP7[fork SystemServer进程]

App启动流程1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041participant Activityparticipant Instrumentationparticipant AMSparticipant ActivityStarterparticipant ActivityStackSupervisorparticipant Looperparticipant ActivityThreadparticipant ActivityManagerparticipant BinderInternalActivity->Instrumentation:startActivityForResult()Instrumentation->AMS:startActivity()AMS->ActivityStarter:startActivityAsUser()ActivityStarter->ActivityStarter:execute()ActivityStarter->ActivityStarter:startActivityMayWait()ActivityStarter->ActivityStackSupervisor:getActivityMetricsLogger().notifyActivityLaunching()ActivityStarter->ActivityStackSupervisor:resolveIntent():ResolveInfoActivityStarter->ActivityStackSupervisor:resolveActivity():ActivityInfoActivityStarter->ActivityStackSupervisor:mFocusedStack:ActivityStackActivityStarter->ActivityStarter:startActivity()ActivityStarter->AMS:getRecordForAppLocked()检查调用者是否存在并获取调用者pid和uidActivityStarter->ActivityStackSupervisor:isInAnyStackLocked(token)通过调用startActivity页面的mToken获取调用者的ActivityRecordnote over ActivityStarter:检查intent.getFlags()note over ActivityStarter:检查intent.getComponent()note over ActivityStarter:检查ActivityInfoActivityStarter->ActivityStackSupervisor:checkStartAnyActivityPermission()检查是否有启动权限ActivityStarter->AMS:mIntentFirewall.checkStartActivity()检查是否有被Intent防火墙拦截note over ActivityStarter:新建ActivityRecordActivityStarter->ActivityStarter:startActivity()ActivityStarter->ActivityStarter:startActivityUnchecked()，先处理CLEAR_TOP情况，ActivityThread->ActivityThread: main()ActivityThread->Looper:prepareMainLooper()ActivityThread->ActivityThread: attach()ActivityThread->ActivityManager: getService()ActivityManager-->ActivityThread: IActivityManager(AMS)ActivityThread->AMS: attachApplication()AMS->AMS: attachApplicationLocked()note right of AMS:attachApplicationLocked查找ProcessRecordActivityThread->BinderInternal: addGcWatcher()note right of BinderInternal: 当 dalvikUsed>3*dalvikMax/4 时
调用AMS.releaseSomeActivities()
释放内存
触发被释放App的LowMemoryKillActivityThread->Looper:loop()
